mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS spotId, mf.id AS forecastId, s.experience, s.name AS spotName, s.region, mf.forecast_date AS forecastDate, mf.time_slot AS timeSlot, mf.total_index AS totalIndex, mf.weather, mf.tide, CAST(mf.metrics AS CHAR) AS metrics, mf.updated_at AS forecastUpdatedAt FROM spots s JOIN marine_forecasts mf ON mf.spot_id = s.id AND mf.id = ( SELECT mf2.id FROM marine_forecasts mf2 WHERE mf2.spot_id = s.id
AND mf2.forecast_date = #{targetDate}
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN mf2.forecast_date >= CURRENT_DATE THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ABS(DATEDIFF(mf2.forecast_date, CURRENT_DATE)),
mf2.forecast_date ASC, mf2.time_slot ASC, mf2.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE s.id = #{spotId} AND s.active = 1

SELECT s.id AS spotId, mf.id AS forecastId, s.experience, s.name AS spotName, s.region, mf.forecast_date AS forecastDate, mf.time_slot AS timeSlot, mf.total_index AS totalIndex, mf.weather, mf.tide, CAST(mf.metrics AS CHAR) AS metrics, mf.updated_at AS forecastUpdatedAt FROM marine_forecasts mf JOIN spots s ON s.id = mf.spot_id WHERE mf.id = #{forecastId} AND s.active = 1

SELECT a.spot_id AS spotId, a.forecast_id AS forecastId, s.experience, s.name AS spotName, mf.forecast_date AS forecastDate, mf.time_slot AS timeSlot, mf.total_index AS totalIndex, a.recommended, a.recommendation_reason AS recommendationReason, a.source_forecast_updated_at AS sourceForecastUpdatedAt, a.generated_at AS generatedAt FROM ai_spot_analyses a JOIN spots s ON s.id = a.spot_id JOIN marine_forecasts mf ON mf.id = a.forecast_id WHERE a.forecast_id = #{forecastId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_spot_analyses ( spot_id, forecast_id, recommended, recommendation_reason, source_forecast_updated_at, generated_at ) VALUES ( #{spotId}, #{forecastId}, #{recommended}, #{recommendationReason}, #{sourceForecastUpdatedAt}, #{generatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE recommended = VALUES(recommended), recommendation_reason = VALUES(recommendation_reason), source_forecast_updated_at = VALUES(source_forecast_updated_at), generated_at = VALUES(generated_at)
